name: Crescendo
description: The classic multiplication-table doodle with the numbers stripped away: tone deepens smoothly with row times column, re-rolling its grid on every redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( margin: 0.5px; background: var(--color1); opacity: @calc(0.04 + 0.96 * sqrt((@x * @y) / (@X * @Y))); transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
